channel.title: mycatalog updates
channel.description: 'My Catalog' uses the IBM Cloud catalog API to retrieve data from the catalog. It attempts to be as accurate as possible. This feed shows additions, updates, removals from the catalog. Use with care. It is a work-in-progress :)

item.title: [added] Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization Service on IBM Cloud (openshift-vs)
item.description: Run enterprise VMs on Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization Service on IBM Cloud with a modern, Kubernetes-based platform.

item.title: [updated] watsonx.governance (aiopenscale) has changed the description of the plan named essentials
item.description:
*before*: The watsonx.governance Essentials plan enables organizations to monitor AI Models for quality, health, and trust metrics; explanations and what-if analysis, and automatically document model metadata with custom use cases.
A paid instance of a supported database (Databases for PostgreSQL, Db2 or Db2 warehouse) must be used., *after*: The watsonx.governance Model Management Essentials plan enables organizations to monitor AI Models for quality, health, and trust metrics; explanations and what-if analysis, and automatically document model metadata with custom use cases.
A paid instance of a supported database (Databases for PostgreSQL, Db2 or Db2 warehouse) must be used.

item.title: [updated] watsonx.governance (aiopenscale) has a new plan named grc-advanced
item.description: The Risk and Compliance – Advanced plan provides the critical capabilities related to AI Governance. It provides AI visibility, Use Case onboarding, risk assessment and identification, Regulatory Compliance Management, and accountability. It is ideal for medium sized organizations or departments in larger looking to get started with AI Governance.

item.title: [updated] watsonx.governance (aiopenscale) has a new plan named grc-basic
item.description: The Risk and Compliance – Basic plan provides the critical capabilities related to AI Governance. It provides AI visibility, Use Case onboarding, risk assessment and identification, Regulatory Compliance Management, and accountability. It is ideal for small organizations or departments looking to get started with AI Governance.

item.title: [updated] watsonx.governance (aiopenscale) has changed the description of the plan named lite
item.description:
*before*: The watsonx.governance Lite Plan offers everything you need to begin your journey to governing AI models across your business, including access to explanations, bias detection and mitigation, and automated AI capabilities.
- The Lite plan includes a free internal PostgreSQL database instance with a maximum size of 100 MB.
- The instance is hosted and not directly accessible. - Data in this database cannot be migrated and is lost if the instance is reconfigured. - The internal database is not GDPR compliant. - For workloads that process personally identifiable information (PII), or when upgrading from the Lite plan to the Essentials plan with continuity requirements, a paid instance of a supported database from the IBM Cloud catalog must be used., *after*: The watsonx.governance Model Management Lite Plan offers everything you need to begin your journey to governing AI models across your business, including access to explanations, bias detection and mitigation, and automated AI capabilities.
- The Model Management Lite plan includes a free internal PostgreSQL database instance with a maximum size of 100 MB.
- The instance is hosted and not directly accessible. - Data in this database cannot be migrated and is lost if the instance is reconfigured. - The internal database is not GDPR compliant. - For workloads that process personally identifiable information (PII), or when upgrading from the Model Management Lite plan to the Model Management Essentials plan with continuity requirements, a paid instance of a supported database from the IBM Cloud catalog must be used.
